fragments.plaintext: No. 1 in 2024. No. 1 in 2025. Jannik Sinner shows how it's done again in Melbourne.

caption.text: No. 1 in 2024. No. 1 in 2025. Jannik Sinner shows how it's done again in Melbourne.

@madisonkeys
on winning in Melbourne.

caption.text: The difference between patience and persistence is your first major. Congrats @madisonkeys on winning in Melbourne.

is ready to own the court in Australia.

fragments.plaintext: Six cities. Zero off hours. From Sydney to Mexico City, race the night away at the Nike After Dark Tour, a race series designed for women.

caption.text: Six cities. Zero off hours. From Sydney to Mexico City, race the night away at the Nike After Dark Tour, a race series designed for women.
